channel.title: Data-Catalog on OpenSwap Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Data-Catalog on OpenSwap Guide

item.title: Amundsen vs DataHub vs OpenMetadata: Self-Hosted Data Catalog Guide 2026
item.description: Modern organizations manage hundreds of databases, data lakes, warehouses, and streaming pipelines. Finding the right dataset, understanding its lineage, knowing who owns it, and trusting its quality are daily challenges for data teams. Commercial data catalogs like Alation, Collibra, and Informatica Enterprise Data Catalog charge premium prices and lock your metadata behind proprietary formats.
